prompt: A photorealistic, cinematic shot set in the White House press briefing room. At the podium sits Sam Altman, wearing a dark suit and blue tie, looking visibly uncomfortable and nervous, staring blankly ahead. Standing directly behind him is Homelander from The Boys, wearing his signature blue superhero suit with red gloves and gold eagle shoulder pads. The standing character has one red-gloved hand resting heavily and intimidatingly on the seated character's shoulder, while using his other hand to drink from a glass bottle of milk with a confident, slightly unhinged smirk. In the background, there is a US flag on the left and a blue oval White House seal on the wall behind them. The podium has a sign reading "THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON".
